sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39163" key="e)pidesmeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-δεσμεύω</orth>, <sense id="n39163.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bind up,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.125</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
